subcodes.first_line: O loving friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! All the holy ones throughout past ages and centuries were weeping and burning with grief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء جمیع اولیا در اعصار و قرون ماضیه گریان و سوزان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @thankfulness; gratitude, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement
